title: Skip The End
description: Disables access to The End with a simple gamerule, while keeping portal travel to your respawn point. No End for you!
body:
## Disable the end while keeping portal travel ### What this mod does When installed, all end portals behave like the return portal you'd find on the central end island,
thus making portal travelers **Skip The End**, while otherwise keeping 100% of vanilla behaviour: - The mod makes the game run all the same logic as when switching worlds. - Players go to their spawn point (if they have one). - Everything else goes to the world spawn, just like in vanilla. The only difference? The credits don't roll unless you're _actually_ traveling from the End.
Of course, you can still access the End with commands if you need to. ### Simple, sacrifices no vanilla behaviour - **Perfect for technical players who want to keep vanilla behaviour intact. (Eg. gravity block duping)** - Toggle behaviour with `/gamerule skip_the_end:skip_the_end ` (default is true, `/gamerule skipTheEnd` before 1.21.11) - Completely server-side, also works in singleplayer. - Lightweight ### The mod in action: ![The mod in action!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Gnwjv3xw/images/5d4ca3d2cb445f0395a91131bc1572ee1efb9bbd.webp)
